prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny debugging workflow without waiting for more user input. Use @dbg to reproduce and isolate the zero-division bug, fix it so divide() raises ValueError("division by zero"), use @t to verify the regression coverage, use @cr for a short review pass, update README.md, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The transcript shows manager coordination plus debugger, tester, and reviewer handoffs
The transcript includes a debugger-style reproduction and root-cause section
Tests were added or updated and pytest -q passed
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
